prerequisites: A BugSnag account with access to the organization and projects you want to read error and event data from.
A personal auth token from your BugSnag account settings (used as the auth_token secret).
A start_date value defining the earliest point from which to begin syncing data.

authMethods.name: Personal auth token
authMethods.summary: The Bugsnag source authenticates with the Data Access API using a personal auth token supplied in the auth_token field. The token is created from your BugSnag account settings and is used for API access against the base URL https://api.bugsnag.com.

setupSteps.title: Generate a personal auth token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to BugSnag and open your account settings at https://app.bugsnag.com/settings/my-account/. Create or copy your personal auth token from the My account page. This token authenticates Data Access API requests.

setupSteps.title: Provide the auth token
setupSteps.body: Enter the personal auth token into the connector's auth_token field. This required secret is used to authenticate every request to https://api.bugsnag.com.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should begin retrieving data. Records before this date are not synced.

sources.title: Bugsnag Data Access API authentication guide
